title: thelypteris trachyphylla
intro: Thelypteris trachyphylla, also known as the Fern-leaved Lady Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris trachyphylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, or it can be made into a tincture or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
